zh.East Riding, Yorkshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.Londesborough,,Yorkshire,England: 英國英格蘭越可爾隆德斯波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Thornburgh於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親John Thornburgh6歲，母親Elizabeth Pierpoint37歲。他於1369年與Katherine Hilton在英國英格蘭越可爾隆德斯波洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1400年在英國維斯特莫藍德享年67歲。

zh-hans.Londesborough,,Yorkshire,England: 英国英格兰越可爾隆德斯波洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Thornburgh于大约1335年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭时，他的父亲John Thornburgh6岁，母亲Elizabeth Pierpoint37岁。他于1369年与Katherine Hilton在英国英格兰越可爾隆德斯波洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1400年在英国維斯特莫藍德享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thornburgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire) and Irish: variant of   Thornbury  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thornbury
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Thornburgh was born about 1335, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Thornburgh, was 6 and his mother, Elizabeth Pierpoint, was 37. He married Katherine Hilton in 1369, in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1400, in Westmorland, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Thornburgh est né environ 1335, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thornburgh, avait 6 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pierpoint, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Hilton en 1369, à Londesborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1400, à Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Thornburgh um 1335 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thornburgh 6 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Pierpoint 37. Er hat 1369 in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Hilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1400 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Thornburgh è nato il circa 1335 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Thornburgh, aveva 6 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Pierpoint, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Hilton nel 1369, nel Londesborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1400, nel Westmorland, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Thornburghが約1335年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父John Thornburghは6歳，母Elizabeth Pierpointは37歳であった。1369年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアロンデスボロウでKatherine Hiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1400年にイギリスウエストモーランドで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Thornburgh(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thornburgh(은)는 6세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Pierpoint(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 론데스버루그h에서 Katherine Hilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1400년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Thornburgh nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Thornburgh, tinha 6 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Pierpoint, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Hilton em 1369, em Londesborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1400, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Thornburgh родился около 1335 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Thornburgh было 6 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pierpoint, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Hilton в 1369 г. в местности лондесбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1400 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Thornburgh nació aproximadamente 1335, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Thornburgh, tenía 6 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Pierpoint, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Katherine Hilton en 1369, en Londesborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1400, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
